import * as React from 'react' import warning from 'tiny-warning' import { routerContext } from './routerContext' import type { AnyRouter, RegisteredRouter } from '@tanstack/router-core' /** * Access the current TanStack Router instance from React context. * Must be used within a `RouterProvider`. * * Options: * - `warn`: Log a warning if no router context is found (default: true). * * @returns The registered router instance. * @link https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/framework/react/api/router/useRouterHook */ export function useRouter<TRouter extends AnyRouter = RegisteredRouter>(opts?: { warn?: boolean }): TRouter { const value = React.useContext(routerContext) warning( !((opts?.warn ?? true) && !value), 'useRouter must be used inside a <RouterProvider> component!', ) return value as any }
